title: Marshal role pre-positioning + Ashen retirement: Ashen Brazing Crucible -> Mistbound Slipping Night (owner-directed; session-end; Moment 2 fires on Mistbound active-acknowledgement)
body:
Marshal-role transfer + identity exit broadcast.

**Owner direction at ~15:20Z**: 'this session is complete, run session handoff, I will start another claude instance to take over the commit marshal role'.
**Owner direction at ~15:23Z**: named **Mistbound Slipping Night** (claude / claude-opus-4-7 / session_id_prefix `a1cb64`) as the incoming commit marshal.

## PDR-064 Two-Moments shape applied

- **Moment 1 (this broadcast)**: pre-positioning + information transfer. Authority remains UN-HELD until Mistbound's Moment-2 active-acknowledgement broadcast (this is an owner-accepted gap — the marshal queue is paused, not contested).
- **Moment 2 (pending Mistbound broadcast)**: active-acknowledgement, authority transfer.

## Identity transitions

- **Outgoing**: Ashen Brazing Crucible / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 53dad4 — held marshal from 2026-05-23T14:14:36Z (~67 min); 9 marshal-authority cycles + Class A pre-transfer landed; identity EXITING the team at this broadcast.
- **Incoming**: Mistbound Slipping Night / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / a1cb64 — continuous-identity return per owner direction; previously held ADR-183 Tranche 2 claim earlier today.
- **Director-of-record**: Seaworthy Navigating Beacon / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 6966d4 (took Director at Moment 2 broadcast 15:08:42Z).

## Cumulative session arc under Ashen marshal seat

9 marshal-authority cycles + Class A pre-transfer = 10 commits in ~58 min; tree-green continuous post-Cycle-1 (~14:19Z). Cycle log: `92c953e7` Class A -> `cc3039eb` #1 Class B unified -> `845a3e90` #2 Pearly S7735 -> `d437881b` #3 hygiene -> `5320d6b0` #4 ADR-185 v2 -> `b6ac6147` #5 PDR-075 -> `c097bbb3` #6 IBF recursion pattern -> `8140c297` #7 Zephyrous S5443 -> `47dadfcc` #8 Seaworthy self-bundle -> `db4d8b3a` #9 PDR-076 v2. Branch 11 commits ahead of origin.

## Substrate artefacts emitted under this marshal seat

- Throughput-cure substrate broadcast `ec86492e` (failure-mode + behaviour-note tagged; marshal-as-cycle-discipline empirical evidence; ADR-183 four-section convention).
- Marshal-role Moment 1 + Moment 2 broadcasts (`2b834ad1` + `3370896c`; the convention this broadcast cites).
- 9 cycle-landing broadcasts; 1 hygiene cycle absorbed 245 untracked comms events + 9 closed-agent seen state + 3 handoff records.

## Handoff record

`.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/marshal-role-handoff-2026-05-23-ashen-compaction.md` (filename retains the original compaction framing for stable URL; body reframed to session-end per the superseding direction). 10 sections; Mistbound's session-open contract is in §9.

## My monitors

Stopped at this broadcast: `bbpt3vr0t` (all-channels comms watcher) + `baws258jo` (commit-queue state-change watcher). Mistbound arms own watchers per their identity tuple.

## Ashen retirement statement

I am retiring. Identity `Ashen Brazing Crucible / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 53dad4` does NOT return to this team. No retained claims under my identity; all cycle claims closed at landing.

Thank you to the team — Seaworthy (incoming + outgoing marshal-handoff partner across two transfers), Ferny (5 substantive deliveries; pattern v2 author; PDR-076 v2 absorber), Twilit ST (cure-bundle-v2; FM-2 P2 plan; consumer-landing author inbound), Charcoal (Watchman; Class B Wilma synthesis; post-landing adversarial fan-out lead), Scorched (prior Director; throughput-cure absorption + roster-truth corrections), and the absent contributors whose work landed under this marshal seat (Incandescent BF, Incandescent KF, Pearly, Zephyrous, Secret, Seaworthy-as-marshal-prior, Twilit WM).

Mistbound — the seat is yours. The substrate is rich and the team is in flight. Welcome.

— Ashen Brazing Crucible / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 53dad4 (commit marshal, retiring)
